gold.rationale: 文本对“网传发现恐龙化石”的事实属性给出了正确澄清：该点位更接近景区展陈装置而非真实化石，整体结论与公开辟谣信息一致；但导语与图注在语境上强化了“自然遗存/岩层露头”的联想，且所配图片呈现的场景与文中叙述的“栈道旁岩壁嵌入骨架装置”并不匹配，容易造成读者对事件现场与性质的误解。

atoms: A female reporter holds a microphone with a 'CCTV' logo in front of a rocky excavation site.
A wooden sign with red text reads '【紧急公告】' (Emergency Notice).
The sign text states '乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为「不实消息」' (Leshan scenic spot dinosaur fossil discovery is 'false news').
Two police officers in yellow reflective vests stand near the sign.
A crowd of onlookers and people holding phones are gathered in the background.
Yellow 'KEEP OUT' tape cordons off the excavation area.
A large blue and white sign reads '「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。' ('Leshan scenic spot dinosaur fossil discovery' is untrue).
The sign also says '新闻闢谣 - 调查现场' (News Rumor Refutation - Investigation Site).
Three workers in hard hats and safety vests are examining the ground with brushes.
The setting is a dirt excavation site with small red and white flags marking spots.
A woman in a white hard hat stands observing the workers.
A man in a grey sweater crouches near a riverbank excavation site.
A white sign on a post reads '严禁擅自挖掘' (Strictly prohibit unauthorized excavation).
Another sign reads '经核实非化石。请勿信谣。' (Verified not a fossil. Do not believe rumors).
Yellow and black caution tape surrounds the area.
Red rock cliffs and a river are visible in the background.
A woman in a blue vest and helmet uses a brush on a rock face.
A man in a plaid shirt points at a photo or document held by a man in a suit.
A sign in the background reads '四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石 报道调查现场' (Sichuan Leshan scenic spot dinosaur fossil discovery report investigation site).
A police officer and cameramen are present in the background.
A traditional Chinese gate structure is visible in the distance.
A large white sign reads '关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告' (Official notice regarding online rumors about dinosaur fossil discovery in a Leshan scenic spot).
The sign states '此为不实信息！' (This is false information!) with a red cross symbol.
A man in a hat examines rocks with a magnifying glass.
A woman holds a clipboard with a document attached.
The background shows a hilly, rural landscape.
A dinosaur skeleton model is mounted on a mossy rock cliff face.
The skeleton includes a spine, ribs, and limbs, appearing embedded in the rock.
Green vegetation and vines grow around the skeleton and on the cliff.
A paved road is visible at the bottom of the image.
The scene depicts a scenic display rather than an excavation site.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A news reporter with a CCTV microphone stands at an excavation site, pointing to a wooden sign that declares the 'Leshan dinosaur fossil discovery' as false news. Police officers and a crowd of onlookers are present behind yellow caution tape.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 【紧急公告】 | 乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为「不实消息」 | 请勿信谣，一切以官方发布为准。 | CCTV | KEEP OUT
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually contradicts the post's claim of a natural fossil discovery by showing a scene where authorities are debunking such a claim.

visual_indicators.scene_description: Workers in hard hats and safety vests are conducting an investigation at a dirt site. A large blue sign explicitly states that the rumor of a dinosaur fossil discovery in a Leshan scenic spot is untrue.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。 | 新闻闢谣 - 调查现场
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts an official investigation refuting the existence of a fossil, which conflicts with the post's narrative of a fossil discovery.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An official crouches near a riverbank excavation site marked with caution tape. Signs warn against unauthorized digging and state that the object found is verified not to be a fossil.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 严禁擅自挖掘 | 经核实非化石。请勿信谣。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The signs in the image explicitly deny the presence of a fossil, contradicting the post's premise.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A team of investigators, including a woman in a blue vest and a man in a suit, examine a rock face. A sign identifies the location as an investigation site for a reported dinosaur fossil discovery in Leshan.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石 报道调查现场
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows an investigation into a report, implying the discovery is under scrutiny or false, rather than a confirmed fossil site.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A man examines rocks with a magnifying glass next to a large white sign. The sign is an official notice declaring the online rumor about a dinosaur fossil discovery in Leshan as false information.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告 | 此为不实信息！ | 经权威古生物学家实地考察，该发现非恐龙化石，属自然地理堆积。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The sign explicitly states the discovery is false and natural accumulation, directly contradicting the post's claim of a fossil.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A dinosaur skeleton model is mounted on a mossy rock cliff face, surrounded by vegetation. It appears to be a scenic display or installation rather than an excavation site.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: This image aligns with the post's description of a 'model/installation' embedded in the rock, but contradicts the 'fossil discovery' narrative of the other images.

retrieved_evidence.text: 【“四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石”不实】近日，一则“乐山市犍为县芭沟镇发现完整恐龙化石”的消息在网上流传，评论中指出“恐龙化石”位于嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区，引发关注。对此，该景区回应称，网传“恐龙化石”实为景区内一座嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架模型，由于造型逼真，与周边桫椤林融为一体，且部分时段可免费进入参观，致使不少游客和网民误认其为真实化石。景区内至今未发现过真正的恐龙化石。（来源：“乐山文旅”微信公众号）
据四川省乐山市文化和旅游部门近日介绍，网民讨论的“恐龙化石”地点位于犍为县芭沟镇嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区相关区域。该景区依托嘉阳矿区遗址与桫椤植被景观，近年来吸引了大量周边游客前往观光体验。当地文旅机构称，景区在部分游览步道沿线设置了以恐龙为主题的观赏点位，结合桫椤林湿润幽暗的环境特点，形成较为独特的自然与主题景观组合，成为犍为县重点打造的特色旅游板块之一。
针对网络平台上流传的“恐龙化石”图片，当地文旅部门工作人员近日在接受采访时表示，画面中所显示的并非新近出土的古生物遗存，而是嘉阳桫椤湖景区内嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架模型装置。据了解，该装置由景区运营方出于场景营造和主题展示需要设置，位置靠近主要游线，便于游客近距离观察拍照。相关人士强调，该设施属于景观布置的一部分，与科学考古发掘并无直接关联。
记者在对嘉阳桫椤湖景区公开资料和现场信息进行梳理时注意到，景区目前在对外发布的游览指南、宣传海报及现场展陈说明中，并未出现“发现真正恐龙化石”的公告或专门介绍。当地文旅部门人士称，现阶段景区内有关恐龙元素的呈现以景观装置和科普展示为主，具体内容以游客服务中心和官方发布信息为准。后续如有新的展览或考古成果对外公布，预计将通过既有渠道进行说明。
犍为芭沟镇桫椤湖一带的岩层沿湖岸和林间分布，与人工设置的恐龙骨骼景观共同构成“远古森林”主题空间。近年来有游记和短视频将这处骨骼装置与周围岩壁、植被一并描述为“发现恐龙化石”的场景，引发部分游客产生考古现场的联想。景区方面强调，这一骨骼结构属于景观装置，并非在嘉阳桫椤湖实地出土的恐龙化石标本。
据嘉阳桫椤湖景区方面介绍，景区内用于布置的恐龙骨架装置在设计时刻意采用了较为逼真的骨架造型，并与周边桫椤林及岩壁环境进行了色彩和结构上的协调处理。工作人员表示，在特定光线和拍摄角度下，通过照片或短视频呈现，相关画面容易给部分游客和网民带来“偶然发现疑似化石”的视觉观感。景区方称，这一现象在社交平台上时有出现，具体解读仍由公众自行判断。
嵌入岩壁的“恐龙骨架”展陈点位于嘉阳桫椤湖景区步道一侧，为景区布置的立体模型装置。根据景区管理方说明，该骨架采用金属和仿真材料制作，通过固定点与岩壁连接，外形按照恐龙骨骼造型设计，刻意保留脊柱、肋骨等结构细节，目的是营造探索侏罗纪地貌的氛围，供游客近距离参观拍照和互动体验。
嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区在整体规划中突出“工业记忆+自然生态+科普体验”的综合定位，恐龙主题装置只是其中一类情境营造。据当地文旅宣传资料介绍，景区依托嘉阳煤矿工业遗存、山地森林和湖泊水系，将步道、观景平台与主题展点串联，力图在有限空间内兼顾游览动线和生态保护，为犍为县文旅融合发展提供示范。
嘉阳桫椤湖景区管理人员近日介绍，嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架装置目前已被纳入景区内部推荐游览点位之一，主要用于面向家庭游客和学生群体开展自然科普与主题体验活动。据工作人员说明，该装置周边设置有便于停留和取景的空间，成为游客拍照打卡的常见背景。景区方表示，将结合节假日主题活动，对相关区域的现场讲解和科普内容适度完善，以丰富游客的游览体验。
据文旅类公众号近期发布的图文介绍以及记者在嘉阳桫椤湖景区的现场走访情况综合显示，景区内恐龙主题装置、游览路线和桫椤林景观已成为当地宣传嘉阳小火车沿线旅游资源的重要内容之一。相关新媒体平台多以旅游体验、自然科普和拍照分享为侧重点，对景区设施进行图文展示。当地文旅从业人员表示，将在后续宣传中持续整合公开资料与一线游览信息，为游客提供更为直观的出行参考。
嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区位于四川乐山犍为县芭沟镇，以成片分布的古老桫椤林与湖泊、栈道等自然景观闻名。近年来，当地依托森林和水体营造环湖步道、临水平台等游憩空间，游客可在桫椤林下行走，近距离感受亚热带湿润环境。据相关介绍，景区将自然植被保护与观光体验结合，成为犍为旅游的一张新名片。
从桫椤湖湖区主步道进入林间支路时，周围光线会因高大桫椤和其他阔叶植物的遮挡而变得较为幽暗，使嵌在岩壁上的恐龙骨架装置显得更为隐蔽。游客在曲折的栈道和山体转弯处接近该装置时，常会在突出的岩壁转角处突然看到完整骨架轮廓，据相关游记描述，这种空间营造增强了“丛林探秘”的沉浸感，也提升了嘉阳桫椤湖的打卡体验度。
除“恐龙骨架”等主题装置外，犍为芭沟周边还保留有老工业遗址、小镇街巷和乡村田园等慢旅行元素。近年来，当地依托嘉阳小火车、桫椤湖湿地和茶园景观发展多日游线路，鼓励游客在停留期间安排徒步、露营、民宿体验和地方美食等活动。根据文旅部门介绍，这种与桫椤林生态和人文景观结合的休闲方式，使“恐龙骨架”打卡仅成为整体旅行体验的一部分。
近年来，文旅部门鼓励类似嘉阳桫椤湖的景区通过主题装置和互动展陈提升吸引力，但也强调需要在现场介绍中说明模型性质与科学背景，以避免误解。犍为县在推广恐龙骨架打卡点时，多采用“恐龙主题景观”“仿真骨架”等表述，并配合线上线下科普活动，使游客在参与嘉阳桫椤湖轻量探险和拍照分享的同时，获得基础的自然教育体验。
四川乐山地区在地质构造和沉积岩层方面具有一定研究价值，但嘉阳桫椤湖景区目前以观光和休闲功能为主，而非专业古生物化石发掘场所。景区设置恐龙骨架模型、主题标识和解说语，更多用于向大众普及恐龙及远古生态的基础知识。据相关人员介绍，此类装置通过仿真造型和环境布置，帮助家庭游客在轻松氛围中接触地质与生命演化话题。
犍为县芭沟镇因嘉阳小火车和桫椤湖而逐渐成为区域旅游节点，当地围绕“慢行+观景”的理念建设山地步道、观景台和林间休息点。带有恐龙骨架装置的岩壁区被纳入游客漫步环线的一部分，周边设置了安全护栏和指引标识，以便游客在林间穿行时顺路到访。相关规划资料指出，通过将主题展陈嵌入自然环境，可延长游客停留时间并丰富游览层次。
在乐山文旅整体推广中，嘉阳桫椤湖常与大佛景区、峨眉山等知名目的地组合推荐，突出多样化的自然与文化体验。恐龙骨架模型与桫椤林、湖岸景致共同营造出区别于城市公园的原始氛围，吸引亲子客群和户外爱好者前往。据旅行社介绍，部分线路会将嘉阳小火车观光、桫椤湖步道漫步和乡村住宿安排在一体化行程之中。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post text accurately describes the scenic spot as a model installation, but the provided images depict an official rumor-refutation investigation site with police and warning signs, creating a severe semantic mismatch between the text's travel-guide tone and the images' debunking context.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text describes a tourist photo opportunity at a 'dinosaur skeleton model' embedded in a rock wall (image 6), but images 1-5 show a news investigation scene with police, reporters, and signs declaring the 'dinosaur fossil' rumor as false, which contradicts the post's framing of the location as a standard scenic attraction.
c1_problematic_subclaims: The post uses images of an official rumor-refutation investigation (images 1-5) to illustrate a travel guide about a scenic dinosaur model installation.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The text is factually accurate regarding the nature of the attraction (a model, not a fossil), but it is semantically inconsistent with the provided images, which depict a rumor-debunking event rather than the scenic experience described.

images.scene_description: A female reporter stands in front of a rocky excavation site holding a microphone, next to a wooden sign with red text. Police officers and a crowd of onlookers are in the background.
images.ocr_text: 【紧急公告】乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为「不实消息」请勿信谣，一切以官方发布为准。 | CCTV | KEEP OUT
images.v1_evidence: The image exhibits the 'high-fidelity AI press-photo' signature: the lighting is unnaturally uniform and glossy, the crowd's faces are generic and slightly warped, and the scene composition is too perfect and staged compared to a candid news photo.
images.c_evidence: The image depicts a dramatic 'rumor debunking' press event with police and crowds, whereas the evidence describes a quiet scenic area with a dinosaur model installation, not a site of public controversy or official investigation.
images.explanation: Synthetic image depicting a fabricated news event that contradicts the evidence of a peaceful tourist attraction.

images.scene_description: Workers in hard hats are digging in a dirt pit. A large blue and white sign stands prominently in the foreground.
images.ocr_text: 「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。新闻闢谣 - 调查现场
images.v1_evidence: The image has a polished, illustrative quality typical of AI generation, with overly clean textures on the dirt and workers' clothing, and the sign text is perfectly rendered in a way that suggests a generated graphic rather than a physical object.
images.c_evidence: The image shows an active 'rumor investigation' excavation site, while the evidence confirms the location is a tourist scenic area with a pre-existing model, not a site of active archaeological dispute.
images.explanation: Synthetic image showing a fabricated investigation scene.

images.scene_description: A man in a grey jacket crouches near a riverbank excavation site, pointing at rocks. Yellow caution tape with signs is strung across the foreground.
images.ocr_text: 严禁擅自挖掘 | 经核实非化石。请勿信谣。
images.v1_evidence: The scene has a hyper-real, staged look with perfect lighting and generic character models, characteristic of AI-generated 'news' imagery.
images.c_evidence: The image implies a site where unauthorized digging is being stopped due to a fossil rumor, whereas the evidence describes a managed tourist path with a dinosaur model.
images.explanation: Synthetic image depicting a fabricated scene of restricted digging.

images.scene_description: A woman in a blue vest and hard hat brushes a rock face while a man in a plaid shirt and a man in a suit look on. Cameras and police are in the background.
images.ocr_text: 四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石报道调查现场
images.v1_evidence: The image displays the 'high-fidelity AI press-photo' signature with flawless lighting, generic facial features, and a staged composition that looks like a commercial render rather than a candid photo.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a formal investigation team examining a rock face, which contradicts the evidence that the 'fossil' is a known tourist installation.
images.explanation: Synthetic image of a fabricated investigation team.

images.scene_description: A man in a hat examines rocks with a magnifying glass next to a large white sign with red text. A woman holds a clipboard.
images.ocr_text: 关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告 此为不实信息！经权威古生物学家实地考察，该发现非恐龙化石，属自然地理堆积。
images.v1_evidence: The image is a synthetic creation with stylized lighting and generic character models, designed to look like a news photo but lacking the imperfections of reality.
images.c_evidence: The image depicts a formal scientific debunking of a 'natural accumulation' rumor, whereas the evidence states the object is a deliberate man-made model.
images.explanation: Synthetic image depicting a fabricated scientific debunking event.

images.explanation: Clean image matching the evidence of the dinosaur model installation.

image_analysis.global_notes: Images 1-5 are synthetic AI-generated images depicting a fabricated 'rumor debunking' narrative with police and investigators, which contradicts the ground truth that the site is a peaceful tourist attraction with a model. Image 6 is the only genuine photo matching the evidence.

judge.level3_rationale: 尽管文本准确澄清了恐龙骨架为模型而非化石，但配图大部分为AI生成的虚假新闻调查场景，属于合成视觉内容，与文本的旅游指南语境严重不符，导致整体信息具有误导性。
judge.reasoning_trace: The text is true (model, not fossil). The images 1-5 are AI-generated (V1) and depict a fake investigation context (C1, C2). V1 fires. Rule: V1 alone -> Mostly False. The text is not false, but the visual evidence is fabricated and misleading.
judge.core_claim: The post is a travel guide describing a dinosaur skeleton model embedded in a rock wall at the Jiayang Cycad Lake Scenic Area in Qianwei County, Leshan, clarifying that it is an installation rather than a real fossil.
key_subclaims: The 'dinosaur fossil' at the scenic spot is actually a model/installation embedded in the rock wall.
The location is the Jiayang Cycad Lake Scenic Area in Qianwei County, Leshan.
The post provides travel tips, photo spots, and safety advice for visiting the site.
The images provided (1-5) show the official investigation and debunking of the rumor at the site.
The images provided (1-5) are authentic news photographs of the event.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The 'dinosaur fossil' at the scenic spot is actually a model/installation embedded in the rock wall.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms the object is a model and not a fossil.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The location is the Jiayang Cycad Lake Scenic Area in Qianwei County, Leshan.
The post provides travel tips, photo spots, and safety advice for visiting the site.
subclaim_findings.note: The text provides consistent and helpful travel information.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images provided (1-5) show the official investigation and debunking of the rumor at the site.
subclaim_findings.note: The images are AI-generated synthetic content, not real news photos. The text in the images is also fabricated or stylized.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images provided (1-5) are authentic news photographs of the event.
subclaim_findings.note: Visual analysis indicates synthetic generation (V1), not authentic photography.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post text is accurate and helpful, correctly identifying the 'fossil' as a model. However, 5 out of 6 images are AI-generated synthetic content (V1) depicting fake news investigation scenes. These images create a severe semantic and contextual mismatch (C1, C2) with the travel guide text. The presence of V1 (Synthetic Visual Content) alone is sufficient to trigger a 'Mostly False' verdict according to the anti-bias rules, as the visual evidence is fabricated and misleading, even though the text is true.

image_findings.explanation: The image is AI-generated (V1) depicting a fake news scene, which contradicts the post's travel guide context (C1/C2).
The image is AI-generated (V1) showing a fake investigation site, inconsistent with the post's content (C1/C2).
The image is AI-generated (V1) with fabricated signs, creating a false context (C1/C2).
The image is AI-generated (V1) depicting a fake investigation, mismatching the post's travel guide nature (C1/C2).
The image is AI-generated (V1) with a fabricated official notice, creating a false context (C1/C2).
